basic_details.job_title: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR Central Glass And Ceramic Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR Central Glass And Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI) Project Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR CGCRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CGCRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: Upto 5 years for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped and Female candidates, and 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy layer) candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry (Physical or Inorganic in specialization) / Materials Science / Nanoscience from a recognised university, B.E. / B.Tech in Ceramic / Metallurgy & Materials Engineering / Material Science / Nanoscience and Technology / Chemical Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry (Physical or Inorganic in specialization) / Materials Science / Nanoscience from a recognised university. B.E. / B.Tech in Ceramic / Metallurgy & Materials Engineering / Material Science / Nanoscience and Technology / Chemical Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs.31,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m. or Rs.25,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
